name: Mike Turner
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEwMzgzNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MDMzMjQ5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Thanks to you, we were able to hit our reelection campaign's first fundraising goal by the deadline!
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEwMzgzNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDMzMjQ5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDEwMzgzNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDMzMjQ5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Hey Peter,
Thanks to you, we were able to hit our reelection campaign's first fundraising goal by the deadline!
Our campaign can and will continue fighting for Miami Valley and Southwest Ohio everyday. We won't sit by, while Nancy Pelosi's Congress continues down a path of obstruction and lies.
Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi continue to run a baseless, political, and hidden impeachment process. The American people deserve to know where their taxpayer dollars are being spent! I will not stop fighting until Pelosi and Schiff's wasteful basement proceedings are ended.
There are so many issues we need congressional leadership on. Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, the devastating opioid epidemic affecting our Ohio communities, and so many other important issues affecting the people of this district.
[_**I am asking for your support to help me continue fighting for the people of this district**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDEwMzgzNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDMzMjQ5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0). We can't allow Washington lobbyists like my opponent to buy this district with their special interest dollars coming in from D.C., San Francisco, and Detroit.
I won't stop fighting for our communities!
Thank you,

Mike Turner
**[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDEwMzgzNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDMzMjQ5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
---
120 W. Second St. #1510 Dayton, OH 45402
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEwMzgzNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDMzMjQ5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDEwMzgzNzIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDMzMjQ5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc87f/3eb3e2fc/56781e56/744d8e95/1278044034/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc87f/3eb3e2fc/56781e56/744d8e94/1278044034/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc87f/3eb3e2fc/56781e56/744d8e93/1278044034/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: Washington Nationals present President Trump with team jersey
body:
A few hours ago, President Trump welcomed the 2019 World Series champion Washington Nationals to the White House's South Lawn. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df46ae081c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 4, 2019
---
| | |
# **WATCH: Washington Nationals present President Trump with team jersey**
---
| **A few hours ago,** President Donald J. Trump welcomed the 2019 World Series champion Washington Nationals to the White House for a celebration on the South Lawn.

**🎬** **Watch:** [Nationals give President Trump a #45 jersey! ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b417abe01&e=3ee4985eea)

**“America fell in love** with Nats baseball,” President Trump told a cheering crowd.

**Nationals first baseman** Ryan Zimmerman—one of many players to speak during the event—presented the President with a ceremonial team jersey. “Thank you for having us here. This is an incredible honor,” Zimmerman said. “We’d also like to thank you for keeping everyone here safe in our country, and continuing to make America the greatest country to live in the world.”

[Watch: President Trump welcomes the 2019 World Series champion Nationals!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74fe4954ab&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
# **The left keeps getting it wrong, and states like Kentucky keep soaring**
---
| **The buildup** to last Friday’s jobs report had a familiar story: Market “experts” and liberal critics of the President joined to boldly predict that October would be a lousy month for job growth. The booming Trump Economy would finally grind to a halt, they said.

**But if there’s one thing** these “experts” are consistent with, it’s being reliably wrong in anything having to do with President Trump or his policies.

**🎬** **Larry Kudlow:** [The facts don’t lie: “Middle-income families are flourishing.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=043dc29662&e=3ee4985eea)

**Friday’s jobs report** smashed all expectations—yet again—as the economy added 128,000 new jobs during the month of October. That tally far exceeds the 85,000 mark predicted by economists. (The real number is even better: Accounting for the recently resolved General Motors strike, as well as for positive revisions to the totals for August and September, more than 300,000 jobs have been added to the U.S. economy.)

**The historic news** didn’t end there. Wages are on the rise across America, with 15 straight months and counting of 3 percent or higher average hourly pay increases.

**President Trump** is heading to Kentucky tonight, where this blue-collar, middle-class boom is lifting up families across the state—even if the Beltway media can’t bring itself to acknowledge the success of hardworking Americans under a conservative President.

**In the Bluegrass State,** the numbers tell the story:
* 48,000 jobs have been added in Kentucky since President Trump’s election.
* That total includes 7,400 manufacturing jobs and 1,800 construction jobs.
* Kentucky’s unemployment rate reached 4% earlier this year, the lowest rate ever recorded in the state.
* Its unemployment rate has been under 5% for 26 consecutive months, something that didn’t happen even _once_ under the previous Administration.

**Those results** aren’t likely to change anytime soon—unless things get even better. Last month, UPS announced plans to invest $750 million and create an additional 1,000 jobs at their major air hub in Louisville.

**The liberal echo chamber** might want to pump the brakes on their doom-and-gloom predictions for a while. For a better barometer of how America is doing, they can put down their “expert” op-eds, step outside the Beltway, and talk to some American workers. With more than 6.7 million jobs added since President Trump’s election, the best is yet to come.

[Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all climb to records as stock market extends gains.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=202d969075&e=3ee4985eea)

**History being made:** [African-American unemployment hits new record low!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3a08f9a1f4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **President Trump is presented with a jersey from the 2019 World Series champion Washington Nationals** | November 4, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=493fc96fb8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f1575f0a0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6c6cbbf024)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Jason Yates
subject: One year from today - what will be said of us?
body:
| | Peter, One year from today, the elections of 2020 will be over. Our country will have decided who will serve as our president for the next four years. We will know which political party will control the U.S. Senate and the House of Representatives. **In all, 100,000+ elections will be decided in 2020, each with the opportunity to either advance God’s good - or oppose it. It’s just that simple.** One year from today, will we have elected those who do not stand for the principles of our faith? Or worse, will we have elected those who will actively fight against us? **In 365 days,_what will be said of the faithful?_** I’m counting on you to get off the sidelines in 2020. I believe that you’re engaged, and that you will do all you can to help empower other Christians to take action in these important elections. The countdown clock has begun. From now until November 3, 2020, the media outlets will be consumed with election news. Most of it will be biased. Little of it will be fact-based. Less of it will be God-honoring. That’s why I want you to [pledge to vote](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSPl3_AVzw-8MP0x3pn0Dhe41iYx3TF0t55xA4zW0fPYfCLeAk1AOWd6Vj5-5V4eZ6mEZt9XRnkk4E0--1ovu8U1kS6zBgkm8kPL3Lnq0lUvGal5DtB2vzaQWju6W1NaBtXRagTTmDmANUrj3whB73k&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104com01&n=1). **Click the button below to pledge to stand boldly together at the voting booth for Judeo-Christian values so that the sanctity of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness are upheld for future generations.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iSPl3_AVzw-8MP0x3pn0Dhe41iYx3TF0t55xA4zW0fPYfCLeAk1AOWd6Vj5-5V4eZ6mEZt9XRnkk4E0--1ovu8U1kS6zBgkm8kPL3Lnq0lUvGal5DtB2vzaQWju6W1NaBtXRagTTmDmANUrj3whB73k&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104com01&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104com01&n=3)

subject: Re: President Trump's VIP guest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=ef6e500796&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
**Peter, there are only a few hours left to enter this contest for a chance to meet President Trump for lunch and a photo on Friday, November 8th. **

A lot of people have entered, but the President has noticed your name isn't on the list. He really wants you to enter this contest.

[**All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT before 11:59 PM TONIGHT.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a53ff1ad2f&e=02cd889ad3)We'll make sure President Trump is updated as soon as you enter the contest.

David Perdue

\---------- Original message ----------
From: **Donald J. Trump** <[info@perdue2020.com](mailto:bonnie@perduesenate.com)>
Date: Monday, November 4th, 2019
Subject: Don't share this with anyone else

Peter, In the midst of this Impeachment Hoax, there’s nobody I’d rather spend time with than my most loyal supporters. I don’t want to spend another second with the SWAMP, I want to be amongst the PEOPLE. That’s why I have an exciting announcement for ONLY my TOP supporters, and I can’t wait to share it with you. I’ve scheduled an important event in Atlanta on November 8th where I’ll be meeting with great American Patriots, and [**I want YOU to be there with me as my VIP guest. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8d2ac4ba82&e=02cd889ad3) My good friend, who’s a true warrior, Senator David Perdue, will also be there to meet and talk with the great people of Georgia. All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT by November 4th, and you’ll automatically be entered to win a meal with me. This offer is exclusive to my most LOYAL defenders, like YOU, so DON’T share this with anyone else. [**Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to be automatically entered to win a trip to meet me in Atlanta on November 8th.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5bd9cd095b&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [DONATE NOW >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1b42fa619b&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
| This will be the trip of a lifetime, Peter. If you win, the team will cover your flight, hotel, and meal, AND you’ll get to bring a guest of your choice. We’ll even take a photo together so we can remember this day forever. [**Contribute ANY AMOUNT by the deadline on November 4th to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to meet your favorite President! **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=54e5b91236&e=02cd889ad3) Thank you,
[](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8bf6865b99&e=02cd889ad3)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
---
| [DONATE NOW >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=cc7736b7a2&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
|
---
|

---
| |
---
| **NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN.** Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Perdue for Senate by clicking [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=4c8702fa4c&e=02cd889ad3). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3d98ea8e52&e=02cd889ad3). Entries must be received between November 1, 2019, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on November 4, 2019 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend the lunch (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d87a32056b&e=02cd889ad3) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Perdue for Senate, PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355.

---
| PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355
[Privacy Policy](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3c3652116a&e=02cd889ad3)

Want to change how you receive these emails? We would hate to see you go - these emails are critical to our campaign - but you can [update your preferences](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3&c=e5b9f6c7c3)

| We know we send a lot of emails, but the truth is: We're counting on you. David is an outsider, not a career politician. He got elected because of supporters like you. He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!
---

name: Mitch Schwartz
subject: What's on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends,

**[Nothing is more important than defeating Donald Trump in 2020 while winning the Senate and holding the House.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae7b/134673f2/a5246fd/6997cef2/39065836/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/November-Survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B1_110419_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**

Michael has ambitious and durable solutions to reverse the damage done by Donald Trump and make progress on our greatest challenges, and he wants to make sure everyone's voice is heard.

If we're going to create an America that works for all of us, one that the next generation deserves, we've got to work together.

That's why we want to know the **[top issues](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae7b/134673f2/a5246fd/6997cef2/39065836/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/November-Survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B1_110419_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")** you believe Michael should be running on as we work to defeat Trump.

**[Can you take our quick survey now, so we can share your thoughts with Michael?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae7b/134673f2/a5246fd/6997cef2/39065836/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/November-Survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B1_110419_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Will you split a donation between the Virginia Democratic House Caucus and my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
When we work together, we win together, and we build the party infrastructure needed to defeat Trump in 2020

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2638%2E377263%2EDp2pyG) **Pitch in to help Virginia Democrats flip the House tomorrow** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Andrew Yang and the Virginia House Democratic Caucus will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15999?t=5&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2638%2E377263%2EDp2pyG)

---
Yang Gang --

We’re partnering with the Virginia House Democrats to help flip the state blue during tomorrow’s election. The strength of America’s democracy lies in ensuring that the will of the people is reflected in our government, both state and nationwide.

We want to help boost the VA House Democrats’ field program in the hours leading up to the vote. **Because every last door knocked and conversation will affect tomorrow’s outcome.**

One of the most impactful ways we can help Virginia Dems win is by providing last-minute resources to fund their get-out-the-vote program. That’s why I’ll be in Virginia tonight doing what I can to get people to the polls tomorrow. [Can you join me in helping them get out the vote by splitting a donation with the Virginia Democratic House Caucus and my campaign now? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15999?t=8&akid=2638%2E377263%2EDp2pyG)
We’re all here because we know that this country can and should work for each and every one of us. Tomorrow is the first test. And it’s up to us to make it happen. **Chip in now:**
[Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15999?t=7&akid=2638%2E377263%2EDp2pyG)
---
When we work together, we win together, and we build the party infrastructure needed to defeat Trump in 2020.

Let’s do this,

-Andrew
**We’re partnering with the Virginia House Democrats to help flip the commonwealth blue during tomorrow’s election. Grassroots supporters like you are vital to winning elections. Pitch in your support.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15999?t=6&akid=2638%2E377263%2EDp2pyG)
---

name: URGENT REQUEST (via 314 Action)
subject: 24 hours left:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action, 314action
body:
| HUGE NEWS: President Obama endorsed two of our Democratic scientists for the VA Legislature.

[Contribute $3 or more to stand with President Obama and flip the VA legislature blue.](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-virginiaelections?amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=auto&refcode=314_EM_FR_191104_30DO_U1_X10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+ask+or+more+to+stand+with+Pre&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191104_30DO_U1_X10&source=314_EM_FR_191104_30DO_U1_X10")
* * *
In 2018 Democrats were one seat away from winning a majority in the State Legislature in Virginia for the first time in decades.

**The final election was decided by a coin toss!**

Meet our 314 & President Obama endorsed candidates:

* **Cheryl Turpin** is a science teacher and state delegate - she has been a member of the Virginia Education Association and the National Education Association.
* **Hala Ayala** is a American cybersecurity specialist - she is an outspoken champion for women's rights and advocate for working families.

With less than 24 hours until the polls open we need your help to ensure we WIN in Virginia tomorrow.

name: Christina Finello
subject: Polls are open!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Happy Election Day, Peter! Just a friendly reminder that the polls are now open all across our state, and in many other states across the country. Polls here in Pennsylvania close at 8PM, and as long as you’re in line by then, you have the right to cast your ballot. Not sure where to vote? You can find your polling location here: [**https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11550086/117763457/364851138?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2JiOTgwNS1jOGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fcd0sjfAE6eFAFVvZR1iGSrnX72AfCkn7CQvLmsM4ps=&emci=c8540e8f-42ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=93bb9805-c8ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10163004) There are some incredible Democrats on the ballot today, especially here in Bucks and Montgomery Counties. This year, we have the chance to elect great leaders at the local level who will advocate on behalf of the people and communities they serve. I’m proud to have stood alongside and supported these candidates throughout 2019, and their wins today will help us lay the groundwork for an even stronger 2020. That’s why I’m all in for making sure we have a sweeping blue victory today. So I’m asking you personally to get out there and VOTE \-- and to get your friends, family, and neighbors to vote, too. Happy voting! Christina | | **[FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11550087/117763458/364851138?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2JiOTgwNS1jOGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fcd0sjfAE6eFAFVvZR1iGSrnX72AfCkn7CQvLmsM4ps=&emci=c8540e8f-42ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=93bb9805-c8ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10163004)**

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: I got game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**I'm no Shaq, but I can still take it to the rack.**
On my walk across New Hampshire, I took a little detour to drain some buckets with former pro-basketball player Luke Bonner in Concord.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11552127/117781886/-746828343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgzM2U2Ny1kMGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_OGGHdfPezQ5RAZLthhzN2BzggbBslcaiBTsRQe0E=&emci=33bbf134-61ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=72833e67-d0ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
**We spent an hour shooting the sh*t and talking about my candidacy on the court. Now the video's out - and you can watch it[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11552128/117781887/-1683746525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgzM2U2Ny1kMGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_OGGHdfPezQ5RAZLthhzN2BzggbBslcaiBTsRQe0E=&emci=33bbf134-61ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=72833e67-d0ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798).**

**Want to see my swish? Watch[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11552130/117781889/-1683746525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjgzM2U2Ny1kMGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_OGGHdfPezQ5RAZLthhzN2BzggbBslcaiBTsRQe0E=&emci=33bbf134-61ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=72833e67-d0ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798).**

Joe

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, I believe in you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

Today, folks in Iowa and across the country are heading to the polls for important local and state elections (if you haven’t voted yet, please go vote). That means we have less than a year to defeat Steve King.

As we build this campaign together, I just have one thing I want to say:

Remember why you’re in this -- and why we are.

We’re standing tall for the forgotten people of our country: the farmers, ranchers, manufacturing workers, nurses, teachers, and working people who have been left behind, the folks who can’t afford basic medicines like insulin, the children who need healthcare, and the families who are saddled with too much debt.

**_[If you’re proud of the voices we’re helping to lift up -- and if you believe we can win this thing and give hope to Iowans and millions of Americans who desperately need their democracy to work for them again -- please chip in $5 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11560685/117849171/-1664084380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEyY2Y4Yy1lOWZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u4Oe_aIUWWPviWeUcggXZDhXVxBibc7asTSntB35LKg=&refcode=em19_191105_eday_jd_l1)_**

Our campaign is about coming together.

We believe in hard work, integrity, fairness, and supporting our neighbors.

But how do you build a campaign that can take on Steve King and the special interests when you’re not rich? The answer is folks like you.

**_[I believe in you, Peter. Let’s have no regrets on Election Day next year -- let’s get to work on winning this race together. Please, if you can, chip in $5 or more now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11560686/117849172/-1664084380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEyY2Y4Yy1lOWZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u4Oe_aIUWWPviWeUcggXZDhXVxBibc7asTSntB35LKg=&refcode=em19_191105_eday_jd_l2)_**

Thank you,

J.D. Scholten

P.S. -- Need to confirm your polling location for today’s elections? **_[Click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11560687/117849173/-1612268846?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEyY2Y4Yy1lOWZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u4Oe_aIUWWPviWeUcggXZDhXVxBibc7asTSntB35LKg=&emci=5d768f89-3fff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=fe12cf8c-e9ff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11560688/117849174/-1664084380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEyY2Y4Yy1lOWZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u4Oe_aIUWWPviWeUcggXZDhXVxBibc7asTSntB35LKg=&refcode=em19_191105_eday_jd_button)

name: Team Sestak
subject: JOIN John Berendt, Pulitzer Prize Finalist, and Admiral Joe Sestak, Presidential Candidate, FOR AN IMPORTANT EVENING ABOUT AMERICA'S FUTURE - Thursday, November 14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
In a time of uncertainty, with Twitter-fed presidential leadership, an economy on the brink of potential recession and a Nation fighting terrorism around the world, spend the evening with one of our Country's true leaders, and envision a bold future.

Join Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
at a Fundraiser on Thursday, November 14
hosted by Amy and Ken Ferris, Carol and Mark Herman, Paul Scoles, Roger Smith, Megan Strub and Doug Manion, Sean Strub, Diana Wiener, Bob Worth

* Former 3-star Admiral; commander of aircraft carrier battle group
* Interacted with Presidents, Parliamentary Members, and leaders of Ministries
* President Clinton’s Director of Defense Policy; head of Navy’s Strategic Anti-Terrorism Unit
* PhD in Political Economy & Government and Masters in Public Administration from Harvard
* Former U.S. Congressman; Vice Chairman, Small Business Committee; most productive Congressperson in his class; saved over 800 homes from foreclosure
* Elected and re-elected (by 20 points) in a 2-1 Republican Congressional District
* Challenged former Republican Senator Arlen Specter and won the primary, after being 40 points down.

Joe is running to unite this country, convene the world under U.S. leadership, and to bring about pragmatic policies that move America forward and serve all Americans.

His presidential campaign launched on June 23 in Iowa. The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[Joe] impresses with experience, smarts and discipline..." and The National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race. Joe has launched his TV ads and walked 'in our shoes' across New Hampshire , meeting people and discussing their challenges. His showing in the latest CNN poll clearly demonstrates these actions have resonated.

Come and learn more about Joe’s Plan for America [https://www.joesestak.com/plan-for-america/] , and the restoration of trust, unity and accountability.

Thursday, November 14 at 6:30 p.m.
at the Home of John Berendt
Pulitzer Prize Finalist for Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil
135 W. 87th Street (between Amsterdam and Columbus)
New York, NY 10024

Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250
To RSVP and/or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception111419]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing
a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Questions or to RSVP (and contribute at the reception): Email reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c7b72f9c-8dfe-e911-828b-2818784d6d68/a270964d-ecff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjcwOTY0ZC1lY2ZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQ3RJcLxxpNUmJIvcIktocH3XjK95kN5dS5ZlQ9vMU4=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

| Friend,

Today is Election Day across America and the future of our nation is at stake. If you live in one of the 28 states with an election (listed at the bottom of this email), get out and **VOTE REPUBLICAN!**

**Today is our big chance to shock and upset the leftist establishment — just like we did in 2016.**

You see, midterm and off-year elections usually get low turnouts. Here in New Jersey, Phil Murphy and his cronies are probably chuckling to each other right now: _"Eh, we got this one in the bag."_

**Let's show them they're _wrong_. Let's show them we're _united_.**

Review the list below carefully — **if you see your state, it's time to take action and VOTE TODAY.** For help finding your polling place, click the state link and you'll be taken to your specific zip-code locator page.

**Be sure to remind your friends and family to vote Republican!** We're all in this together!

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate 2020

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, Today is Election Day across America and the future of our nation is at stake. If you live in one of the 28 states with an election (listed at the bottom of this email), get out and VOTE REPUBLICAN! Today is our big chance to shock and upset the leftist establishment — just like we did in 2016. You see, midterm and off-year elections usually get low turnouts. Here in New Jersey, Phil Murphy and his cronies are probably chuckling to each other right now: "Eh, we got this one in the bag." Let's show them they're wrong. Let's show them we're united. Review the list below carefully — if you see your state, it's time to take action and VOTE TODAY. For help finding your polling place, click the state link and you'll be taken to your specific zip-code locator page. Be sure to remind your friends and family to vote Republican! We're all in this together! Sincerely, Hirsh V. Singh For the People Republican for U.S. Senate 2020 | | | | P.S. If you're a fellow New Jersey Republican and ready to turn Phil Murphy into a lame duck , please remind your friends and family to VOTE REPUBLICAN TODAY so we can send him a clear message: "You are DONE!" We need to win 41 seats out of 80 in the Assembly to stop Phil Murphy. And remember to vote for EVERY Republican down-ballot — doing so will ensure that our towns are maintained properly. P.P.S.Don't let your friends sit on the sidelines! Today is too important! name: Megan West
subject: Musician Danny Gokey encourages Christians to act on our faith and vote!
body:
| | Your votes have power.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k7g5YkmPb-eNtVx1TEFQ0r8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=1)
| Peter, We spoke with leading Christian music artists about the importance of living out our faith and voting in every election. Their unique platforms bring a tremendous opportunity to motivate and equip more Christians to take action and realize the importance of voting in every election. Danny Gokey, award-winning recording artist and songwriter of popular songs like _Hope in Front of Me_ and _Haven’t Seen it Yet_ , shared how he seeks to live for Christ in a largely secular industry as well as through voting. | | _“Your votes have power. And honestly, you carry the power of the Holy Spirit inside of you, and He leads us into all truth.”_ Danny Gokey
---|---
Today, November 5, millions of Christians have the opportunity to vote for biblical values. This fall alone, there are more than 49,000 elections taking place in 35 states across the country. It’s so important for the preservation of religious freedom, marriage, gender, life, and family - that Christians get out and vote!
You may not have an election in your area today, but we should all be praying for our nation, the elections that are happening and for God to be honored in the results.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k7g5YkmPb-eNtVx1TEFQ0r8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=2)
[Watch this brief conversation with Danny](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k7g5YkmPb-eNtVx1TEFQ0r8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=3) and be encouraged to _Do Good Go Vote_ and help other Christians do the same!
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k7g5YkmPb-eNtVx1TEFQ0r8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=4)
**Do Good. Go Vote.**
Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=5)
P.S. If you aren’t sure if you have an election in your state, you can check the [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=6) to learn if you have an election, see what’s on your ballot, and find your polling place. Don’t miss your opportunity to vote today!
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=7).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191105com01&n=10)

name: Tulsi Gabbard
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: We deserve all the information on 9/11
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11565773/117890812/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzBjNDA3OS1mZGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6TU7jVCJhazQ-hM7YAUU56yiVIiAxpKD7N57XV_utU=&emci=1b0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1c0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| Aloha Friend — Last week, at the 9/11 Tribute Museum in New York City, I stood side-by-side with family members of the victims from the deadly attacks and demanded that **the Federal Government declassify and release all information regarding the September 11, 2001 attacks so as to provide answers to survivors, the families of the victims, and the people of the United States.** All Americans deserve to know the truth about exactly what led to the attacks on 9/11, and who was involved. **[Will you join me in calling on the Trump Administration to declassify and release this information? Add your name, and join me in demanding full transparency.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11565774/117890813/-1431368754?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzBjNDA3OS1mZGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6TU7jVCJhazQ-hM7YAUU56yiVIiAxpKD7N57XV_utU=&emci=1b0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1c0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311&ms=em191105&contactdata=cQTrRbDzlHTWV4BfFexQ%2FHMtGkcZgBaL88TGDxP9F%2BYVjey5O3MDyX0hzLdpsnvbii%2BBR0nMcum8ujpGa1%2BIuaCQQGpYfrVAhIbk4WiYe74%3D&refcode2=1c0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68)** It’s been nearly 20 years since Al Qaeda attacked us on 9/11, and the American people still don’t have access to the truth about Saudi Arabia's role and who helped Al Qaeda carry out these deadly attacks. It is absolutely unacceptable that our government's investigation into Saudi ties has been kept classified from victims' families and the American people. The full disclosure of this information isn’t just necessary for closure for all the families and individuals involved, **it’s essential for our national security so we can keep the American people safe.** The Trump administration must put the interests of the American people first, and release this information now. More than 3,000 Americans lost their lives on that day, and we honor the memory of every single one of them. Those who were just getting to work that morning, children who were just getting dropped off at daycare, first responders who rushed into those crumbling towers to save lives. And the first responders who have been lost ever since. Never, ever will we forget the heroes who sacrificed their lives to save others. For the fallen heroes and their loved ones,
Tulsi Gabbard [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11565775/117890814/-1431368754?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzBjNDA3OS1mZGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6TU7jVCJhazQ-hM7YAUU56yiVIiAxpKD7N57XV_utU=&emci=1b0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1c0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311&ms=em191105&contactdata=cQTrRbDzlHTWV4BfFexQ%2FHMtGkcZgBaL88TGDxP9F%2BYVjey5O3MDyX0hzLdpsnvbii%2BBR0nMcum8ujpGa1%2BIuaCQQGpYfrVAhIbk4WiYe74%3D&refcode2=1c0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68) [View this message in your browser to share](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11565776/117890815/-357219962?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzBjNDA3OS1mZGZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6TU7jVCJhazQ-hM7YAUU56yiVIiAxpKD7N57XV_utU=&emci=1b0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1c0c4079-fdff-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&sourceid=1014165&ms=em191105&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em191105)

name: Davis
subject: VIDEO: President Trump says: "Beshear is a Major Lefty"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Bevin for KY
body:
Last night President Trump made it clear that he stands with Governor Bevin [ ](http://links.mattbevin.com/u/click?_t=31a534ef06db494295aa4ed763a8f36b&_m=cc5615fba1e74898b3dfcdc9186115c4&_e=-00IPRYwcxOF7hlNuUp7rxJ24PXXRJwrWwSZ2TTSmZpHM3LYMAVm3zzkqIF0IvS8sPVZws_Y8vMc8dScRf6-OiLaVW8MY_ayt7rawWbjYngE8fzr4YrX3EayApiHG-ZRceyP8BKooHlGvhnBHdGwMXIREihVJw9vAJDsf4ojDudDD4Mn2zD9Nyfm2SUfT049b-bSFhQaChalBJYxsF8aX6aHwN6rWbUmC4bpyBeGsYBj-mjzNEwevPy72mguH6KW) Friends,

Last night President Trump made clear that he stands with Governor Bevin and that Andy Beshear is "too liberal, too extreme and too dangerous for the state of Kentucky". Take a look: [ ](http://links.mattbevin.com/u/click?_t=31a534ef06db494295aa4ed763a8f36b&_m=cc5615fba1e74898b3dfcdc9186115c4&_e=-00IPRYwcxOF7hlNuUp7r5Y-G_s4wbqzeQ4hArakJRwsdK_NAOtsI_V82zzAI4JtNl4dI9N3e8BqoR-i8_kQQ6DhKShRF1scf2rapuVoDP3UGPwOM1ZQkXxt-9qzb7vvo62aCI2Iz2lm7Dijmj-ZcRLRSwe04xaojbmQ1Kgl6NYbkp4A81wLg-aGyEH3xVmA_C3RYnNjVhh3PHSZk0ovljodBq4TeUxqO1s2PdQEX0pqF1gpISwBNzT-Mqh7Bf86ZG4j9eCiOMANiJtHqbdRJbbLXY7JYTQvDPM0PcUtTZjzlf3hg17-6Q44s3v7vxos) All the success and prosperity that Kentucky has achieved over the past four years is on the line TODAY. If radical socialist Andy Beshear wins, we will lose everything that’s been done to move Kentucky forward under Governor Bevin and President Trump.

That is why we need your vote **TODAY,** friends.

name: Update from Iowa via Cory 2020
subject: Have you seen these photos?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Check out these photos from last week's Liberty and Justice Celebration in Iowa, then please consider **[chipping in to help us continue to build this movement.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCamp-actives_actives_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Team, This was the scene in Iowa this past Friday: [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCamp-actives_actives_i1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Cory was back in the Hawkeye State for the Iowa Democratic Party's Liberty and Justice Celebration -- one of the most important events of the political season before the February caucus. [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCamp-actives_actives_i2_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") He took the stage and inspired us all by speaking about how we're going to defeat Donald Trump, heal our divided country, and put ourselves on the pathway to a brighter future. **" This is a moral moment in America. We as Democrats have to call this whole country to higher aspirations, with a president that tries to divide us, the end for Democrats shouldn't be to beat Republicans. The calling of this party must be to unite Americans again in common cause and common purpose."** [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCamp-actives_actives_i3_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Take a look at some of the people in the stands who were representing this team. Whenever you donate to this campaign, you're supporting the work of our dedicated field organizers, many of whom are pictured above. **[That's a good reason to chip in today!](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCamp-actives_actives_l2_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Here's another perfect picture from that day: [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCamp-actives_actives_i4_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **Moments like this are only possible because of supporters like you.[If you want this movement to keep growing, chip in today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCamp-actives_actives_l3_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Together, we will rise. Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCamp-actives_actives_contribbutton_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Gary Peters
subject: good news from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
| | |
---
Friends: Cook Political Report, a campaign ratings agency, just increased my likelihood of losing. And my extreme opponent just announced he broke fundraising records thanks to Donald Trump funneling $3 MILLION into Michigan to defeat me, buy this seat and expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.

That's why I'm reaching out for your help - but first, I hope you'll give me just a minute to explain why it's so important we defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat.

If we lose here, Democrats will throw away our only chance of taking back the Senate. That means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington. That means he and Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court.
I've won tough elections before, and I'm all in to do it again this time around. But polling shows me tied with my opponent, and analysts at The Washington Post rank me as one of the most targeted Democratic senators in the country.

The good news is that Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can flip the Senate, but only if we first win in Michigan.

So with the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing. We still need another 212 people to become Election Year Members before midnight tonight to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats.

I'd appreciate it if you could give now, even just $3, to help us hit this goal and win. Here's the best link to donate - whatever you give will go toward keeping Michigan blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats: **[_https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email_](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa2c/5721a3ed/7100708b/efa8135/2684556067/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxMjUtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk125-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thank you - it means so much.

Gary

Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins just made Roll Call's list of most vulnerable senators
body:
That doesn't mean this race will be easy!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ce8/4bef7a87/6b1a869b/287fc1fd/3437283299/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
**Susan Collins just made _Roll Call 's_ list of most vulnerable senators. **
It's no surprise, really. Her net approval rating has dropped 46 points since 2017 - the biggest drop of anyone in the Senate!
But beating Susan Collins will still be incredibly difficult. She's a 22 year incumbent with virtually the entire Republican Party establishment and powerful special interest donors on her side.
**That 's why our team wants to make a big statement to demonstrate the grassroots power of this incredible team. Will you help us do it?**
[**Chip in any amount right now to help us reach our 100,000 online contribution goal! Help us prove that our team has the strength and grassroots power we need to win.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ce8/4bef7a87/6b1a869b/287fc1fc/3437283299/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191105-full")
Unlike Susan Collins, we're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so we depend on your small-dollar donations to keep us going.
You've always had our back - because of your support we outraised Susan Collins last quarter! - so we know we can count on you now.
All our best,
\- Team Sara

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Pelosi’s Impeachment Rules Guarantee a Partisan Circus
body:
“A provision slyly added at the last minute is all but certain to deprive President Trump of the ability to defend himself,” Betsy McCaughey writes... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=927d8196fc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Pelosi’s Impeachment Rules Guarantee a Partisan Circus**

“A provision slyly added at the last minute is all but certain to deprive President Trump of the ability to defend himself,” Betsy McCaughey writes in the _New York Post._

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi insists the impeachment procedures adopted last Thursday are ‘the fairest possible.’ Don’t believe it,” McCaughey says.

“Section F, quietly devised by Judiciary Committee Chair Jerold Nadler, stipulates that unless the president surrenders executive privilege — a power even the Supreme Court has ruled is vital to his office — he and his lawyers will be denied any ability to call or question witnesses.”

McCaughey calls it straight: “With a Senate conviction and removal from office highly unlikely, because real evidence of wrong-doing is lacking, the only goal of House impeachment is to damage the president.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0a790d193&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| This week, Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump visits Morocco, where she will promote her women’s economic development program, Darlene Superville writes for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5e3f04c334&e=3ee4985eea). The program, called the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity Initiative (W-GDP), aims to reach 50 million women in the developing world by 2025.
---
|
---
| “As I drove out of the White House complex Thursday and ended my role as President Trump’s special envoy seeking peace and normalized relations between Israel, Palestinians and Israel’s other Arab neighbors, I was both wistful and excited,” former U.S. Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9d810a27a&e=3ee4985eea). “Under the president’s leadership, we have moved forward to bring regional leaders closer to the long-sought goal of peace.”
---
|
---
| Under President Trump, “we will no longer go abroad in search of monsters to destroy,” Brian Kennedy writes in [_The American Mind_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=905e53f4ba&e=3ee4985eea) _._ “It takes immense political courage” to defy the Washington establishment, Kennedy says. The President is on track “to rebuild the American military for the bigger challenges that lie ahead. That by itself is a great achievement.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da1609dc88&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f8b9ee475&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4b4ba6c64c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Our Week at a Glance
body:
Hi Peter!
We have a busy and exciting week ahead of us, and we want you to be a part of it!

First:
We have our weekly phone bank this Wednesday at HQ. We will be calling voters from 5:30 to 8:30. You can sign up for a shift here (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/149564/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=89cde59915-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_01_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-89cde59915-32267927) !
I want to make calls! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/149564/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=89cde59915-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_01_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-89cde59915-32267927)
Second:
This Friday, we will be presenting "A Night Remembering Barbara Jordan," a presentation made by Dr. Paul Joseph -- who worked for Barbara Jordan during her time in congress -- in the late Congresswoman's honor. We cordially invite you to join us in learning more about her, and her historic career and life. Pizza and drinks will be provided!

This event will be Friday, 11/8/2019, from 6-8PM at HQ. Click here to RSVP (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/151299/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=89cde59915-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_01_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-89cde59915-32267927) .
http://mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/151299/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=89cde59915-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_01_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-89cde59915-32267927
Third (and finally):
We will be out knocking on doors again this Saturday. Over the last few weeks, we've knocked on more than a thousand doors. We want to reach as many voters as possible, and we need your help to do that!

Sign up (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/150347/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=89cde59915-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_01_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-89cde59915-32267927) today to walk with Marc this Saturday at any time from 9AM to noon!

Let's go talk to some voters! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/150347/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=89cde59915-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_05_01_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-89cde59915-32267927)
Thank you, as always, for your continued support. Stay tuned via email and social to see what's next!

Marc

name: Rachel
subject: Did you vote yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Bevin for KY
body:
There are only six hours until the polls close in Kentucky, so I’m reaching out to ask: did you vote yet? [ ](http://links.mattbevin.com/u/click?_t=31a534ef06db494295aa4ed763a8f36b&_m=f72b466402cd4c69a0a3fdec67c27eb9&_e=FZWOGkTmr4BKhWkBJlHa25G7x50XQFdNX5YVQ8b6daOrPmkGNH18XZMJ8RLVitnVNKtnLIsW8ZlTpRtSjgyZWLilliShSbWrAcSehSiefJjgQkXqbuc3_5H6T-YmNvu27_Xl6TeAkWHyuxl_yhP9sumN5CfelgPy43HhxvPDenNnVX-zb2yRcbC7h8QcjnLMF_gULQZFbNONJrxo-UIqTrjvVMHOIcd-NiWyt_ifm0UnjjguHbdjmZgI_x6oMzzV) Friends,
There are only six hours until the polls close in Kentucky, so I’m reaching out to ask: did you vote yet?

There’s never been a better time to make your voice heard for the commonwealth. If you want to move Kentucky forward, you need to get to the polls as soon as possible.

**[Use this secure link to find your voting location>>>](http://links.mattbevin.com/u/click?_t=31a534ef06db494295aa4ed763a8f36b&_m=f72b466402cd4c69a0a3fdec67c27eb9&_e=FZWOGkTmr4BKhWkBJlHa2zS4GdiU6gqiXsbFrFJIKTe9fpN7pTwoghcocmoqz7qJqepn3sFtK1Phk_dQqmL5u3a0fCBIj6mpVNWX3lqjAM2xUAVl-21SJRPuLhWz6XJRCggpVAlpnYQyeTxIj-PsOXRXgiScyCUhYTXClhFeyB5QUP59GDtCLsxLp66hrUa4rmbaE3YCxFPoMdo-2iZPTdRZtY6KSxqc-itfQwiCXu9Rf48ETfkJwjgHM8_PKuAc0CCAzZNygowqF_5VGakXKQ%3D%3D)**

We know that Kentuckians everywhere support the values that Governor Bevin protects. Now we just need to make sure that Kentuckians do their part to vote those values before 6pm.

Forward this email to ten of your friends NOW so they get out and vote to move Kentucky forward too!

Thank you for everything,

Rachel Wilson _Finance Director_ | |

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc800/3eb3e2fc/567f238e/744d8ec0/2035973088/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc800/3eb3e2fc/567f238e/744d8ecf/2035973088/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Yang2020
subject: While other candidates slow down, we continue to grow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’re here to win.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2691%2E377263%2EfwMpJm) Yang Gang --

Can you feel the momentum?

This past weekend was a transformational one for the campaign. We saw massive turnout and enthusiasm at the Liberty & Justice Celebration dinner, we opened our sixth Iowa office, released a new online ad, and introduced America to Andrew’s amazing wife, Evelyn. **While other campaigns are slowing down or dropping out, our campaign is growing. And it’s growing quickly.**

[We need to strike while the iron is hot. By contributing $5, you will help take this campaign to the next level and solidify our spot as a top-tier campaign in this race. Pitch in now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16016?t=5&akid=2691%2E377263%2EfwMpJm) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16016?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2691%2E377263%2EfwMpJm)

name: Clarke Tucker
subject: re: event Wed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UG3PKVVuON9K495iuhUvPQwdG1ReNRjlrp7_d40L-Yg=/K7g9LBl79DLguTKKoE3yopgpFj4IAU2c9xch6dBeG-c=)

Friend -

I wanted to give you a couple quick but important updates on our campaign.

First, we learned over the weekend that **a Republican candidate announced his campaign against us.** This obviously changes the race quite a bit.

I want to welcome my opponent to the race -- a healthy exchange of ideas focused on the issues is vital to a functioning democracy. But as one example of an issue at stake in this race, in his first interview for his campaign, our opponent "declined to state a position on the state's version of Medicaid expansion called Arkansas Works, which provides health insurance to about 250,000 low-income Arkansans." In addition to providing healthcare for nearly 10% of our fellow Arkansans, healthcare providers depend heavily on this program. And it just so happens that UAMS, St. Vincent, Baptist, and numerous other medical institutions are based in and around this Senate district and employ countless people who live here. This is just one example of how much we have to fight for in this race.

Second, I am officially filing to run for office tomorrow (Wednesday). The filing fee **to run as a Democrat for Arkansas State Senate is $4,500** , which is a lot of cash.

The announcement of a Republican candidate, taken with the $4,500 filing fee, means I need your assistance. [_**I am humbly asking for your financial support at this time.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/UG3PKVVuON9K495iuhUvPQwdG1ReNRjlrp7_d40L-Yg=/ZPDFK6T518Ik6Zlsa5VJUesg6KN0Xsypo9Bb1blNrEQ=)

Finally, I'd also like to invite you to an event tomorrow (Wednesday) afternoon where we will have a great discussion and a great time. We'll be at 444 Fairfax Ave, Little Rock, AR from 5-7 pm with friends, family, and neighbors from around Central Arkansas. [**Learn more about the event here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UG3PKVVuON9K495iuhUvPQwdG1ReNRjlrp7_d40L-Yg=/6CDwKg7rhNOO9YUBy7FB02AwcaJjhLjRgiy5VVtZIh4=)

If you can't make it to the event, [_**you can also sign up to volunteer, stay informed, or make a contribution here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/UG3PKVVuON9K495iuhUvPQwdG1ReNRjlrp7_d40L-Yg=/K7g9LBl79DLguTKKoE3yopgpFj4IAU2c9xch6dBeG-c=) You can also make a contribution by mailing a check to: P.O. Box 7268, Little Rock, AR 72217.

Thank you for working together with me for a better Arkansas. I know that with your efforts and support, we will win this race.

Talk soon,

Clarke

Paid for by Clarke Tucker for Congress
---
Clarke Tucker for Congress
PO Box 7268
Little Rock AR 72217 United States
[Forward To A Friend](https://act.myngp.com/el/UG3PKVVuON9K495iuhUvPQwdG1ReNRjlrp7_d40L-Yg=/KwaoXR0rcp2xfIGlcT2wDRW2CfoSdS7aAHcmZXLkS2E=)
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/UG3PKVVuON9K495iuhUvPQwdG1ReNRjlrp7_d40L-Yg=/FAOuXxbHXU5TUlB37Ki-ryBCqEDOLf29G1dq-EX-zFU=).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lisa=20Song=20Sutton?=
subject: In the news and on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Song Sutton for Congress
body:
In the news and on the campaign trail | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4c200a9f57d3/border-security-is-family-security-3721569?e=591bcd9d3e)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

I am continuing to work hard, meeting the voters in District 4 and learning about all of the issues important to the people who live here.

Here are some updates from the campaign trail over the last few weeks:
---
|
---
| |
---
Thank you Assemblywoman Dr. Robin Titus, Lyon County Commissioner Bob Hastings, and the rest of the hosts of the candidate meet and greet in Wellington this weekend.

It was a pleasure to explore the very top of our district and meet Lyon County's stakeholders. I'm looking forward to visiting again soon!
---
|
---
| |
---
Also last month was my first day door knocking and meeting voters!

I truly enjoyed my experience, and it solidified why I'm even entering this crazy world of politics in the first place. I will be a constituent-focused representative: meeting Nevadans, hearing them out, and trying my very best to help.

Also, Kimchi and Cupcake came along for moral support and they were a big hit 😂😊 #CampaignCorgis
---
|
---
| |
---
On October 30th I had the pleasure of attending the Keystone Corporation's Annual Dinner where Mr. Sheldon and Dr. Miriam Adelson were the 2019 Economic Freedom Award Honorees and Trey Gowdy shared an excellent keynote speech.
---
|
---
|
---
| [](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=2cadfd0164&e=591bcd9d3e) The NRCC’s “On the Radar” Young Guns program has identified our campaign as a frontrunner in Nevada to defeat Steven Horsford in November 2020.

This is a major accomplishment for our campaign as the NRCC’s Young Guns program requires candidates to work towards specific goals and meet benchmarks throughout the election cycle to ensure their campaigns remain competitive, well-funded and communicative within their districts.
[Read more](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=d1cfc6cd06&e=591bcd9d3e)
---
|
---
| There are two very important ways to help our campaign. First, your donations are critical as we continue to raise money to fund the voter outreach we will need to win this race.

The other way you can help is with your time. Our campaign is out walking neighborhoods, and we need your help! If you're willing to take a walk list and a stack of cards and tell your neighborhood about this campaign, please reply to this email!

As always, please continue sharing the website and mentioning that I’m running on any public social media posts! The more shares, the better!

Fundraising continues to be critical. I"m running against a well-funded incumbent. Unlike other candidates, I am NOT taking a salary from campaign funds; every dollar helps us conduct the voter outreach required to win this election. Thank you again for all of your support! Let's do this!
Donate $25
Donate $50
Donate $100
Donate $250
---
| | | | | | | [](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=1c361f44a8&e=591bcd9d3e)
---
| | [](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=f05f9a55d0&e=591bcd9d3e)
---
| | [](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=7d1f58387a&e=591bcd9d3e)
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Lisa Song Sutton for Congress
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**

Lisa Song Sutton for Congress
4375 Las Vegas Blvd N Ste 7
Las Vegas, NV 89115-0587

[Add us to your address book](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=4c158dbd9d)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=4c158dbd9d&e=591bcd9d3e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://lisafornevada.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c3c3509e302c3b5cd7df749d6&id=4c158dbd9d&e=591bcd9d3e&c=e63e15a240).

name: Team Tina
subject: The grassroots movement that will save the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This case could be the biggest attack on Roe v. Wade in recent years, and we need allies in Washington to protect our rights. Will you stand with us in this fight?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191105ppafendo2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, we have some news.

The Supreme Court announced that they will be hearing the Louisiana abortion ban during this session. And with Brett Kavanaugh on the bench, this case could be the biggest attack on Roe v. Wade in recent years.

Kavanaugh was specifically selected by the President for the Supreme Court, because he would undermine access to legal abortion. And we know Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are ready to fill another extreme partisan Supreme Court seat with a justice that shares their anti-choice views.

**What stands between us having more Kavanaughs on the Supreme Court is taking back the Senate and having more pro-choice allies in the Senate. Tina will always stand up for reproductive health care for Minnesotans and all Americans -- as the only Senator who has worked for Planned Parenthood, she knows what it takes to fight for reproductive rights. In fact, her strong record just earned her Planned Parenthood Action Fund's endorsement.**

**[Now more than ever, reproductive health care is on the line. Rush a donation today if you're with Tina in defending Planned Parenthood and access to abortion care.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191105ppafendo2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191105ppafendo2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") When Louisiana and other states passed these abortion bans earlier this year, we knew these threats on Roe were serious. And now that this law is being brought in front of the highest court, the threats to reproductive health care are too great.

**This is without question: Our rights are under attack. And it will take all of us standing together to defend these rights.**

**[Tina will do everything she can to make sure another Kavanaugh never makes it to the Supreme Court. Rush a donation now so that she can keep fighting for reproductive health care and a person's right to choose in the Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191105ppafendo2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks,

Team Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191105ppafendo2-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Congress: Pass the Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, Our planet is facing unprecedented climate and environmental change, and governments are doing next to nothing about it. In fact, the Trump administration is undoing environmental regulations and withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris climate agreement, setting this country back decades. We need Congress and the White House to take climate change seriously \-- we need them to stand up, be leaders, and take action to ensure a livable future for our kids and grandkids, not hide their heads in the sand and take money from corporations that are causing the problems. The Green New Deal is one concrete action that they can take, securing clean energy jobs, building community resilience, and reducing our harmful emissions. [**If you agree that Congress needs to pass the Green New Deal today, add your name to ours here. The future cannot be left up to chance, and climate change cannot be ignored any longer. It 's time to do something NOW!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc68/6e9863e8/16076126/1db0820e/541025809/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/greennewdeal/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc68/6e9863e8/16076126/1db0820e/541025809/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/greennewdeal/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

| Friend,

Today is Election Day across America and the future of our nation is at stake. If you live in one of the 28 states with an election (listed at the bottom of this email), get out and **VOTE REPUBLICAN!**

**Today is our big chance to shock and upset the leftist establishment — just like we did in 2016.**

You see, midterm and off-year elections usually get low turnouts. Here in New Jersey, Phil Murphy and his cronies are probably chuckling to each other right now: _"Eh, we got this one in the bag."_

**Let's show them they're _wrong_. Let's show them we're _united_.**

Review the list below carefully — **if you see your state, it's time to take action and VOTE TODAY.** For help finding your polling place, click the state link and you'll be taken to your specific zip-code locator page.

**Be sure to remind your friends and family to vote Republican!** We're all in this together!

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate 2020
