Friend,

**We're officially T-1 year out from Election Day** , when voters will head to the polls and make a critical decision on the future of our country.

While it sounds far off, Election Day 2020 will be here before we know it and it's absolutely critical our campaign has the resources we need now for the grueling road ahead.

If you want a U.S. Senator who will fight for our Constitutional rights, border security, the Second Amendment, and defend President Trump against the _Democrats' impeachment sham_ - then we need to hear from you today. **[Will you consider chipping in $25, $50, $100, or even more as we buckle down for the critical year ahead of us.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1fb28cd511e94d1c9e14368be2847aa6&_e=Njm_m37PfF4k4DxoZpF6L13L3tF-Svwor6p-vsDwxnBjcLY4u6PQ-6S0fuDWqb2z2ejsI0feBjxMvvNrNhP2NMGzcnIyqz61lHmb2wToTiyM6JO9FzgxUgXrFIPnBQlv6-r_pFYvedR25mq6R3ksIItj7v38H-71-qdW_QNujaXBX-BozA-XC86YXOGLsHaMosouCE8ZD17DLZ4X10Qcbh01uJFctU1Ls1fdW_R5vl6pm5rUQ5DIr-WVrhvXbMyChxIeflcERUZOxSLfisx18RQmAJ1j-K_YoZapjcukqAzhj9QtId8lKeZBDSTIqHwr2YdFmYYUzj9MdqrmTkLB6NEkTc_WVYG8apKbSm05NfixE8F_qrVNzgrvFheV8AVk)**

| [ **Lead Senator Daines to Victory »**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1fb28cd511e94d1c9e14368be2847aa6&_e=Njm_m37PfF4k4DxoZpF6L13L3tF-Svwor6p-vsDwxnBjcLY4u6PQ-6S0fuDWqb2z2ejsI0feBjxMvvNrNhP2NMGzcnIyqz61lHmb2wToTiyM6JO9FzgxUgXrFIPnBQlv6-r_pFYvedR25mq6R3ksIItj7v38H-71-qdW_QNujaUd4j0jNVLIojqqFbR2pKk5UkfI36PiM2T6AJEaPjYU3DC7qXL6RdmoHc3lf6e79rVWbaEwtzmfmOs7pjC271hxvTGJ-7tklFT6r2lD_XXqXgpQdMtBjIRSqZqNWqysjJtHCEoyb8gTPToJB_SiP_MDRYH0A--yS_yxbCJaeB3fOqnYkzSfBx26rF9rPcxVnjb2cRX15g1FjTJbN1V5bQwu)
---

The next year won't be easy. Democrats know they only have to _flip four U.S. Senate seats_ in order to win back the majority - and it's the Montana U.S. Senate seat that delivers it to them.

While it sounds like wishful thinking, their confidence and recent surge of momentum leads them to believe they can win in Republican strongholds - like Montana.

They will be investing tens of millions of dollars to defeat me, and we've got to be prepared for everything that comes our way over the next year.

**[So will you stand with us today and help us win our race?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1fb28cd511e94d1c9e14368be2847aa6&_e=Njm_m37PfF4k4DxoZpF6L13L3tF-Svwor6p-vsDwxnBjcLY4u6PQ-6S0fuDWqb2z2ejsI0feBjxMvvNrNhP2NMGzcnIyqz61lHmb2wToTiyM6JO9FzgxUgXrFIPnBQlv6-r_pFYvedR25mq6R3ksIItj7v38H-71-qdW_QNujaUgXma5E5IDXHUGhHSwB8nMDWVKkmNreLhf_132CuXt-RJcuY70wFOZcTAuauvnCoSbBZzxJrnsEfaNciwLzbYLq0YpapmuBU9WXjxkqVurb2JGDGzb0CQKBir-xuorM4pwVtqgE2QlotCOdJFZSJEseBjRtZ176vXP1VhE67z7E9aUo1HJ1qZSwcP_TvYprEczB6Z3JebCcsObS139-_NW)**

Thanks,

Senator Steve Daines

[ **Lead Senator Daines to Victory »**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1fb28cd511e94d1c9e14368be2847aa6&_e=Njm_m37PfF4k4DxoZpF6L13L3tF-Svwor6p-vsDwxnBjcLY4u6PQ-6S0fuDWqb2z2ejsI0feBjxMvvNrNhP2NMGzcnIyqz61lHmb2wToTiyM6JO9FzgxUgXrFIPnBQlv6-r_pFYvedR25mq6R3ksIItj7v38H-71-qdW_QNujaXjOlSxbRNWJ4GrT9tef4y6ui_m2WL39-i4wEhcuPQmuYORcZXKDM8fQOGl_vjqY9GodgMh8zI0aYFDptP7iAuTxQ4ul0vkDK8IjrhQ2m5yabkgCamKpxq_103pvD8sr8qbrHkbbMNJOETGVBn5ubjKwAEx9KAySGOm4aFA3yMrHBjdp8Fkr7b8z0Ct1OudWXnTJXQprNeC33SJy6Cf6-MJ)

name: Climate News Alert (via 314 Action)
subject: Nothing but grassroots activism can fix this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action, 314action
body:
| | I'm sure like us; you are furious at the news...
[](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/paris-climate-petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL&source=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL") Withdrawing from the Paris Climate Accords is dangerous and foolish and could prove catastrophic for our planet (we only have one!).

**But there is something you can do: **

**[Be one of 25,000 grassroots petition signers to let the Trump Administration know: we will not stand for their backward and deliberate attempts to sabotage the fight against climate change.](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/paris-climate-petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Be+one+of+25000+grassroots+petition+sign&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL&source=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL")** | | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/paris-climate-petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+raquo&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL&source=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL")
---
Nothing but grassroots activism will get us back on track to saving our planet.

[](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/paris-climate-petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL&source=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL")
Listen no country is immune to the catastrophic damages of climate change, and the benefits of the Paris Climate Accords are plentiful. Remember, we used to be a leader in climate action -- and we can be again.

**[This petition is about letting the world know that WE will not stand for the Trump administration's backwards and dangerous actions.](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/paris-climate-petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+This+petition+is+about+letting+the+world&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL&source=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL")**

We must come together NOW, and show the world, by screaming out:

[We DO want to heal and protect our planet.](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/paris-climate-petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+We+DO+want+to+heal+and+protect+our+plane&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL&source=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL") | [LET THE WORLD KNOW »](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/paris-climate-petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+LET+THE+WORLD+KNOW+raquo&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL&source=314_EM_FR_191105_ParisClimage_U2_X2_30OP_30CL")
---
Thank you,

The 314 Action Team

subject: (Just one reason) why I’m proud of Tom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend, Last week, Tom participated in the first-ever presidential town hall moderated by formerly incarcerated leaders at Eastern Penitentiary in Philadelphia to talk about criminal justice reform. I’m proud to support Tom — who was one of just three candidates to attend — because these are the kinds of conversations needed to move our country forward. Tom’s campaign for president is about showing up for the people and communities suffering under corporate greed and unjust ‘justice’ — he’s fighting for a better future in which every voice is heard. **Can you show your support with a $1 donation to get Tom and this message on the December debate stage?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Tom understands that restorative justice starts with the recognition that race is part of our current criminal justice system. If we are going to address the trauma and lasting effects of incarceration, it starts with being honest about the racism poisoning the system. Tom knows that African Americans are the most policed and criminalized demographic in our country, and those voices must be heard in this process. Tom didn’t just talk during the town hall — he listened to the people who are suffering. This isn’t a new fight for Tom. He worked to end cash bail in California, and he partnered with NextGen America and other progressive leaders to help restore civil rights to formerly incarcerated people in Florida. It is time for equal rights and protections under the law, including for those who’ve served their time. When Tom sees something fundamentally unjust, he starts thinking about how to fix it. And that means showing up for events like this one and having difficult conversations with people who live this experience every day. clean_body: | | | | Friend, Last week, Tom participated in the first-ever presidential town hall moderated by formerly incarcerated leaders at Eastern Penitentiary in Philadelphia to talk about criminal justice reform. I’m proud to support Tom — who was one of just three candidates to attend — because these are the kinds of conversations needed to move our country forward. Tom’s campaign for president is about showing up for the people and communities suffering under corporate greed and unjust ‘justice’ — he’s fighting for a better future in which every voice is heard. Can you show your support with a $1 donation to get Tom and this message on the December debate stage? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | Tom understands that restorative justice starts with the recognition that race is part of our current criminal justice system. If we are going to address the trauma and lasting effects of incarceration, it starts with being honest about the racism poisoning the system. Tom knows that African Americans are the most policed and criminalized demographic in our country, and those voices must be heard in this process. Tom didn’t just talk during the town hall — he listened to the people who are suffering. This isn’t a new fight for Tom. He worked to end cash bail in California, and he partnered with NextGen America and other progressive leaders to help restore civil rights to formerly incarcerated people in Florida. It is time for equal rights and protections under the law, including for those who’ve served their time. When Tom sees something fundamentally unjust, he starts thinking about how to fix it. name: Matt Liebman, Executive Director of Voter Protection Project
subject: Devin Nunes is targeting our organization
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter, as the Executive Director of Voter Protection Project, I'm proud to say that this organization has been raising money for Devin Nunes' Cow's legal defense fund for months. But now, Nunes is filing a lawsuit to obtain all records of our communications with The Cow and expose her identity, leaving her vulnerable to threats and stalking from his supporters. Nunes is trying to scare us and The Cow into silence. Now, more than ever, we need you to stand with us so we can continue our mission of protecting free speech and democracy. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter, as the Executive Director of Voter Protection Project, I'm proud to say that this organization has been raising money for Devin Nunes' Cow's legal defense fund for months. **But now, Nunes is filing a lawsuit to obtain all records of our communications with The Cow and expose her identity,** leaving her vulnerable to threats and stalking from his supporters. **Nunes is trying to scare us and The Cow into silence.** Now, more than ever, we need you to stand with us so we can continue our mission of protecting free speech and democracy. **[Can you pitch in $5, $10, or $15 to protect Voter Protection Project and The Cow from Devin Nunes' continued lawsuits and harassment? clean_body: | | Peter, as the Executive Director of Voter Protection Project, I'm proud to say that this organization has been raising money for Devin Nunes' Cow's legal defense fund for months. But now, Nunes is filing a lawsuit to obtain all records of our communications with The Cow and expose her identity, leaving her vulnerable to threats and stalking from his supporters. name: Michael Bennet
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend: In a moment, [I'm going to ask you to make a $29 donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce71/2181548795/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Tom Steyer propped his campaign up with $47.6 MILLION of his own money, and Donald Trump raised $3 MILLION in a single day.

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and if we're going to stay competitive in this billionaires race, we're going to need your help.

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[We're launching ads, opening new offices, and hiring field staff, but we need to keep building at a fast pace if we're going to fuel this campaign to victory!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce70/2181548795/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[That's where you come in. The average online donation to my campaign is $29, but any amount you donate today will help fuel this fight. Can I count on you? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce71/2181548795/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $10 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce70/2181548795/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce76/2181548795/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce75/2181548795/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce74/2181548795/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
I wouldn't be running if I didn't think we could win.

Together we can keep funding ads, hiring new organizers, and building our movement to reach out to the 90% of Democrats who haven't made up their mind yet about who they are supporting in this primary.

[We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce70/2181548795/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**I 'm counting on you to step up because I know this grassroots team can do it. Will you chip in $29 (or whatever you can) right now?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae77/134673f2/a54ea1b/6997ce76/2181548795/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thank you,

Michael

name: Greg Stanton
subject: in one year...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
In one year, we will be waking up the morning after the most important election of our lifetime.

**And if we do our job turning out the vote in Arizona -- the House, the Senate, and the Presidency could again be led by Democratic leaders committed to uniting our divided country and restoring our nation's dignity around the globe.**

That's why I am so thankful that this past week, grassroots supporters like you contributed **__thousands of dollars__** to our 2020 Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund during our fundraising blitz!

**[We want to make sure we can keep up this positive moment for the whole year, so would you please consider making a monthly contribution of $5 to our 2020 Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/VwEod2vMR8L8jBCoYyeQvv0wUS1Y502N6kkGKgX85Zk=/pEh42MYnOiHSoekOTL7cfN3YoND_j1C8il5BUm_yAbc=?refcode=X_110419_MakeItMonthly_A&amount=5.00&recurring=12)**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/VwEod2vMR8L8jBCoYyeQvv0wUS1Y502N6kkGKgX85Zk=/pEh42MYnOiHSoekOTL7cfN3YoND_j1C8il5BUm_yAbc=?refcode=X_110419_MakeItMonthly_A&amount=5.00&recurring=12)

With twelve grueling months to go between now and Nov. 4, 2020 -- we are going to need to consistently keep up this level of engagement and fundraising to win.

[**Make Your Contribution Monthly -- Chip In $5/Month >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VwEod2vMR8L8jBCoYyeQvv0wUS1Y502N6kkGKgX85Zk=/fmFqJBOeM4lSGMyKcgB2ktFtGSvie8003Wk0WLG9STg=?refcode=X_110419_MakeItMonthly_A&amount=5.00&recurring=12)

We’re so proud to have you on our team.
Dustin _Team Bevin_

name: Booker HQ
subject: FWD: I see you. I love you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, did you see Cory's speech from the Liberty and Justice Celebration in Iowa last week? If you missed it, it's definitely worth checking out below. **[Then consider donating if you believe in this campaign -- the one that unites Americans in common cause to take on the toughest challenges.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCbump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCbump-actives_actives_contribbutton1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Friend, late last night, I spoke at the Liberty and Justice Celebration in Iowa, and I wanted to share it with you... Ten years ago this month, I was in my third year as mayor of Newark, New Jersey's largest city. We were in the middle of the Great Recession, which for a community that's already struggling is like a depression, and it was hard, but we were pulling together, and we pulled through. But at the same time, I was losing one of the most important people in my life, a guy who was like a second father to me who was in the final stages of his battle with cancer. When I started out working as a tenants' rights lawyer in Newark right out of law school, this guy Frank was one of my first mentors. He had spent his life working as a tenant's rights advocate, leading the longest rent strike in Newark's history. We would hear from families who had to deal with rats, mice, and roaches in rooms where their children slept, people who had to boil water on the stove to keep warm during brutally cold winters. Sometimes, the meetings would go on for hours. I would grow restless and impatient -- most folks were saying much of the same things, and I already had all the information I needed for our case. But Frank never rushed anyone. He sat and he listened. After one especially long meeting, I said something to Frank about how long it was. And without judgement or pride, he told me that the meetings were about more than just fixing the buildings. The meetings were about more than sharing information. They were about making people feel seen and heard and understood. They were about giving people a platform and a place to know that they were not alone. **They were about healing.** Frank got older, and I went on the run for city council, then mayor. By the time I became mayor, Frank's health was failing. Eventually, he went blind. But when I would go visit him or pick him up to go grocery shopping or go out to lunch, I would announce myself, and he would say "I see you Cory." It became our regular greeting. "Hi Frank, it's me, Cory." "I see you." The last time I saw Frank, the nurses at the hospice he was at told me it was nearing the end. He was weaker than I had ever seen him, but when I came in, I announced myself, and he could barely breathe but he got out the words, _" I see you."_ I sat with him, I kissed his forehead. I thanked him. I told him how much he meant to me. I told him I loved him. And before I left, he said to me, _" I love you, too."_ Those were the only two things Frank said to me the last time I saw him. The last two things he said to me. _I see you. I love you._ They were words of empowerment and encouragement and engagement: you are not alone in this. I am here for you, and together we will figure this out. I know there are people who want us to believe that we can't win this election by making it about our values. I believe that in order to heal our country, we must choose unity, we must choose a more courageous empathy, we must choose to recognize that we need each other if we're going to make it. **[I'm asking you to join me because I'm asking you to believe in this campaign, the one that unites itself in common cause to take on the toughest challenges.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCbump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I know you all have a lot of choices in this primary. But the choice our country will make a little over a year from tonight isn't going to be just about one person or one office. **It won 't be about what the pundits or the polls were saying the year before -- about who was leading or who was polling at roughly 3 percent.** It won't be about who took the best shots against their fellow Democrats on the debate stage. It won't be about who had the biggest fundraising haul or who checked what boxes at what time. I believe that in order to heal our country, we must choose unity, we must choose a more courageous empathy, we must choose to recognize that we need each other if we're going to make it. **I 'm asking you** to believe that we can do more than remove one man from one office, because beating him is the floor, it's not the ceiling. **I 'm asking you** to believe in an America where we come together to take on our biggest challenges -- from the epidemic of gun violence to the disease of addiction. **I 'm asking you** to believe in an America that leads the world because we invest in people. In good jobs in every community. In a high quality public education for every child. **I 'm asking you** to believe in an America that doesn't shrink into isolation in the face of the world's biggest challenges, but leads and unites the world's great democracies to take it on. **I 'm asking you** to believe in an America where you can turn on the news and see our leaders and feel pride and not shame. **I 'm asking you** to believe in an America where we revive civic grace, where we extend a more courageous empathy to one another and where nobody gets left on the sidelines and nobody gets left behind. **I 'm asking you to believe that you are not alone in this.** Together we will channel our common pain, defeat Donald Trump, and we will win back the White House. **As your president, we will heal our country.** And together, we will rise. Thank you,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191105_BHQ_20191105-fr-BHQ-LJCbump-actives_actives_contribbutton2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: | | | | Hey team, did you see Cory's speech from the Liberty and Justice Celebration in Iowa last week? If you missed it, it's definitely worth checking out below. "=" Thanks, Booker HQ "=" \---FORWARDED MESSAGE--- Friend, late last night, I spoke at the Liberty and Justice Celebration in Iowa, and I wanted to share it with you... Ten years ago this month, I was in my third year as mayor of Newark, New Jersey's largest city. We were in the middle of the Great Recession, which for a community that's already struggling is like a depression, and it was hard, but we were pulling together, and we pulled through. But at the same time, I was losing one of the most important people in my life, a guy who was like a second father to me who was in the final stages of his battle with cancer. When I started out working as a tenants' rights lawyer in Newark right out of law school, this guy Frank was one of my first mentors. He had spent his life working as a tenant's rights advocate, leading the longest rent strike in Newark's history. We would hear from families who had to deal with rats, mice, and roaches in rooms where their children slept, people who had to boil water on the stove to keep warm during brutally cold winters. Sometimes, the meetings would go on for hours. I would grow restless and impatient -- most folks were saying much of the same things, and I already had all the information I needed for our case. But Frank never rushed anyone. He sat and he listened. After one especially long meeting, I said something to Frank about how long it was. And without judgement or pride, he told me that the meetings were about more than just fixing the buildings. The meetings were about more than sharing information. They were about making people feel seen and heard and understood. They were about giving people a platform and a place to know that they were not alone. They were about healing. Frank got older, and I went on the run for city council, then mayor. By the time I became mayor, Frank's health was failing. Eventually, he went blind. But when I would go visit him or pick him up to go grocery shopping or go out to lunch, I would announce myself, and he would say "I see you Cory." It became our regular greeting. "Hi Frank, it's me, Cory." "I see you." The last time I saw Frank, the nurses at the hospice he was at told me it was nearing the end. He was weaker than I had ever seen him, but when I came in, I announced myself, and he could barely breathe but he got out the words, " I see you." I sat with him, I kissed his forehead. I thanked him. I told him how much he meant to me. I told him I loved him. And before I left, he said to me, " I love you, too." Those were the only two things Frank said to me the last time I saw him. The last two things he said to me. I see you. I love you. They were words of empowerment and encouragement and engagement: you are not alone in this. I am here for you, and together we will figure this out. I know there are people who want us to believe that we can't win this election by making it about our values. I believe that in order to heal our country, we must choose unity, we must choose a more courageous empathy, we must choose to recognize that we need each other if we're going to make it. Team --
POLITICO is reporting that Trump's former Attorney General, Jeff Sessions, is considering running against Democratic Senator Doug Jones for his old Alabama Senate seat.
Let's be clear: Jeff Sessions wasn't fit to be Attorney General, and he isn't fit for the Senate. As Coretta Scott King noted in a 1986 letter to the Senate, he used his position as a U.S. Attorney "to chill the free exercise of the vote by black citizens." And he hasn't improved since.
**CNBC says that Alabama is "one of the GOP's best chances to flip a seat" and Roll Call is already calling Doug an underdog. **Democrat Doug Jones is extremely vulnerable.
Democrats can't win back the Senate majority without holding the line in Alabama, so we told Doug we'd help him raise $10,000 to protect this extremely vulnerable Senate seat. Friend,

I feel a little uncomfortable sharing this with you, but my campaign is still short $39,212.63 of our goal of raising $250,000 in our first three months.

**I’m personally reaching out to you today to see if you can help me catch up.**

Campaign goals like these are important and often determine if a candidate can take their message the distance. To put simply, I cannot afford to fall short.

In order to stay in this fight and fulfill my promise to you of locking up violent criminals, securing our borders, and keeping our children safe, I need to raise the remaining $39,212.63 before it’s too late.

Each and every contribution from here on out will put me in position to beat my Democrat challenger and the Washington Establishment (who are eager to see me lose).

**[Would you be willing to step up today and support my campaign with a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even more? Friend, since the moment I announced my campaign for re-election Democrats have made it clear how they feel about me. _Racist, bully, criminal_ – all hateful rhetoric from the so-called “tolerant Left.”

In my opinion – talk is cheap. I’m focused on delivering for you. **[But in order for me to do so I need to raise the remaining $39,212.63 my campaign needs to survive.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=649f1a6b9185446687d4ac3b71cce47d&_e=LZYoKKrg3xAiuK8QBz9nhPvAI0wg0zZXVoB8FUaDYLzW0QhAmVC52G0GXjlF2gWLlGIVfzqlt90PENaxbe5RU52rnygoojVOKvLKoQnHjgBEsZuvlY6UoiFU9f4gRHrmZw_OmxgYvEjThsxEytGxWSNXvjXuKVJnQ1LuMLI0gGuzSc6vImJ5YCTHCYOJca0um5ge-yjVknX_d8V077-MjdzHYypCBfB4aW-6tnCY5KNMw48ZrkFQnR2BmdrzfS2DDGMm1LERx8IhxI-sS6QBfLfV4KzlYNUt9ukflNNSI-e29msn1BSeSO4LT4e-b9MJ-dQyRAtKrBhjbOgDbNiFiMOUmJ_WGkOTyE9XrEB-29tHif4hmyo-V_pwXUuL9upT3Ka_WFe1xK3fUeykfLkafQ%3D%3D)**

Friend,

We knew that if we stood any chance at keeping Texas red and President Trump in the White House, [**we’d need to hit every single goal we set... especially our “total supporters” number.**](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=a0342706a60647e0a109ae2769feb5c7&_e=hkE9AkEoIFEizXI3UbNoBxXiUs1tZCMMCRme6i_Y5MJYjHG94fv-xI_9hT2bNeS6fNGUSsVgolwIiALlSCiZCnN-5bh0Ofn6TjqXgLY7vWUGYhrMU28LqQgNZEn_K8-5fV6_UtIBfct5b1jBJ2zUNhKAKjdJteeUgiH1qUku1gL7oOkatm4aM46jPd4eHWW2m98-Ac4fJgJrTF0s5MIzH1x30BgMu5rHkC2gT-bkki7LRzDM8fk8BtW1uX61VUUAIaucgWIsdyY-OWxgE_q62MoWRD0Jw4_yjlH5uR6DisIbA9Qf6zyQK-8NXNFmKz31mba_RvVKKTauPjwHQ--nz0tmyCpTi83QH7alMaToibBu_AOezjbX66fNCMIO8TN6ADXVB6li6zNM1VNeCoAAF3eZv7gUPPWHrXii2YzfeNQSff3h59L9gATYprl8m3mU)

[**Well, friend, I just received a troubling update from my team (it’s below)... we’re underpacing on our Total 2019 Supporters Goal, and if we don’t pick up the pace right now, we’ll be in hot water leading into 2020. **](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=a0342706a60647e0a109ae2769feb5c7&_e=hkE9AkEoIFEizXI3UbNoBxXiUs1tZCMMCRme6i_Y5MJYjHG94fv-xI_9hT2bNeS6fNGUSsVgolwIiALlSCiZCnN-5bh0Ofn6TjqXgLY7vWUGYhrMU28LqQgNZEn_K8-5fV6_UtIBfct5b1jBJ2zUNhKAKjdJteeUgiH1qUku1gL7oOkatm4aM46jPd4eHWW2m98-Ac4fJgJrTF0s5MIzH91Ku__KEa_jnRRqlwME2ohRGZaGCwrbkNwMPOoMZm3zjVB1NiERLEv31Q2jQcfhm-Dz9-SSDbH7IGM47q3KIdvEkNh2DgPSDxOk_le6KXq3nW54xxX5QT9Z2eiiYfWjrKxDxzzfZ7kDrdgZG2c5yajFLofA0tAhCzoGYdTOU-y0cBPWAVFsQeuoLFtij7n3U7MZJECNRuFfK6Lb3XIdFKZp58GShMXotaVOyDsMFJoY)
In the final months of 2019, **I’M LOOKING TO YOU** to help me catch up before the year is out. That’s why I’m asking you to update your 2019 Membership Status to active – will you show me that you’re engaged in Republican politics and on board Team Cornyn?
**MEMBERSHIP BOX**

[**UPDATE YOUR SUPPORTER STATUS TO “ACTIVE” NOW.**](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=a0342706a60647e0a109ae2769feb5c7&_e=hkE9AkEoIFEizXI3UbNoBxXiUs1tZCMMCRme6i_Y5MJYjHG94fv-xI_9hT2bNeS6fNGUSsVgolwIiALlSCiZCnN-5bh0Ofn6TjqXgLY7vWUGYhrMU28LqQgNZEn_K8-5fV6_UtIBfct5b1jBJ2zUNhKAKjdJteeUgiH1qUku1gL7oOkatm4aM46jPd4eHWW2m98-Ac4fJgJrTF0s5MIzHwjbD7R0T76vwXQ5TawikLLH9nq1eHcfNenEFLThGgIZHfsBVE7q7_UuS_acaI_PAOKbF8duZJvFTY3sO00uVl7nBAlNYFzpBkdUYD71ESSqQUkBsjFfMAAzWsWfESeOuNjjOzVHXbUUAQ-xcnRAVULXSKaFJW7ucsLs87ixWtSvPhGxatD7emo62ioFPH85kUGYheR-GkUOK9Nx5t9HhL59TeF0tfls9pPxR2Ln0Vwr)

Trump’s presidency. We knew that if we stood any chance at keeping Texas red and President Trump in the White House, Friend, it’s been a crazier year than anyone could have predicted. Our president and Texas conservative values have come under an assault that is even more severe than we could have predicted, making it critical that we hit our supporter goals. In the final months of 2019, I’M LOOKING TO YOU to help me catch up before the year is out. That’s why I’m asking you to update your 2019 Membership Status to active – will you show me that you’re engaged in Republican politics and on board Team Cornyn? MEMBERSHIP BOX First Name:Missing Email: SUPPORTER STATUS: INACTIVE | ** I’m trying to accomplish two things here, friend, and I need your help... 1. We need to hit our 2019 supporter goal. Chipping in any amount, as long as it’s done immediately, adds one more supporter to the list counting towards that goal. 2. We need an accurate count of GOP voters who have my back. If we’re going to plan ahead for 2020, we need to know where we stand. Friend, it’s crucial that we update these numbers as soon as possible. If we head into 2020 blind, we’ll be setting ourselves up for failure. I need to know that you’re with me (and President Trump) as soon as possible, friend. – Senator John Cornyn From: John Jackson Date: Tuesday, November 5, 2019 at 8:32 AM To: “SJC” Subject:** the update you requested Senator Cornyn, Attached the update on our 2019 supporter goals you requested in last night’s meeting. Currently, we are 8,400 folks short of our overall goal. Please let me know of any questions you may have. Thank you – John Jackson Campaign Manager Texans for Senator John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc.

name: Ed Markey
subject: The do-nothing president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

By withdrawing from the Paris climate agreement, President Trump is abdicating global leadership on climate action, all to give Big Oil and fossil fuel industries a free pass to continue to pollute and poison.

The majority of the American people support action to combat the climate crisis, but Donald Trump is turning his back on us and future generations.

_**[Join me and sign our petition denouncing President Trump's decision to abandon the global community and our responsibility to combat climate change by leaving the Paris climate agreement.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df67/693b8b0a/441d4908/72de64e4/2417809585/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/denounce-trump-climate-change?source=110519natl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

From super-charged storms to deadly wildfires, climate change is wreaking havoc across the country. And it will cost all of us.

If we fail to act on climate, the United States will accumulate at least $1 TRILLION in damages by 2030.

Facing our greatest planetary challenge, Donald Trump has chosen to do nothing.

But we will not agonize about the climate crisis; we will organize to defeat Donald Trump and pass a Green New Deal.

_**[Stand with me and sign your name to denounce President Trump's decision to leave the Paris Climate Agreement.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df67/693b8b0a/441d4908/72de64e4/2417809585/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/denounce-trump-climate-change?source=110519natl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

Thanks,

Ed

| | We are one year away from the 2020 election. This is the starting bell for a one year sprint. We need everyone on the field, fighting to turn our country around. Nobody on the sidelines, nobody sitting on their couch, nobody hiding in the dark with a cushion over their head. We have one year and we have to win. [**Your early support now has the power to set us up to win big. Donate $3 and power this grassroots movement with me.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb65/6cd27893/52099247/1587891d/3184973466/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-11-04-1year&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Inhumane immigration policies. Denying climate science. Endless attacks on a woman's right to a safe and legal abortion. Attempts to gut health care. And stacking the courts with unqualified and radical judges. name: Josh Mahony
subject: What's happening on the East Coast
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
Today, Virginians will go to the polls to decide their fate.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191105vote&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| Friend,

Virginians go to the polls today.

With redistricting on the line, this election could decide the fate of Virginia for the next decade.

What happens in Virginia today, it can and will be a blueprint for how we can win in 2020, no matter the results of the election.

**[We're setting a goal of 150 grassroots donations by the end of the week to help us get a kickstart on our November fundraising. With the country watching Virginia today, we need to be ready to hit the ground running immediately tomorrow. Can I count on you to be one of our first donors this week and contribute $10 or more towards our goal?](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191105vote&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $10](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em191105vote&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $25](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em191105vote&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em191105vote&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $100](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em191105vote&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em191105vote&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Donate Other Amount](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?refcode=em191105vote&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Our election is sooner than you think. If we are going to win, we need to get as many people to the polls as we can. That means we must reach every voter in every corner of the state.

**I 'm committed to flipping this seat and sending Tom Cotton into an early retirement, and now I need you. **

**[People across the country will continue to write off Arkansas if we don't hit this new goal, and I want to prove them wrong -- I know we can do it. Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us flip this seat?](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191105vote&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you,

Josh Mahony

name: Laura Loomer
subject: President Trump is Moving . . .
body:
President Donald J. Trump is switching his residence to my home Congressional District—Florida 21!
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352642-820690-4706802-69a93c97d3-e924e0ec29)
Patriot,

President Donald J. Trump is switching his residence to my home Congressional District—Florida 21!

Florida 21 is home to Mar-a-Lago, the Winter White House. So it has always been a matter of personal pride to flip my district from Blue to Red, but now, it’s a matter of national pride!

President Trump and our great republic are under constant attack by sore loser Democrats and the radical left. They refuse to accept the will of the people.

Sixty-four million Americans voted to elect a political outsider who has kept his promises to drain the Washington Swamp and put our citizens and country first.

I am running against an incumbent Democrat Representative who is part of the swamp and is advocating for the baseless and nonsensical impeachment of not only the duly elected President of the United States, but her own constituent, whose constitutional rights she has sworn to protect.

President Trump and every other resident of FL Congressional District 21 deserves a representative that puts them and America First.

[**Help me beat Lois Frankel.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352642-820690-4706801-3b90fe2ebc-e924e0ec29)

Thank you again for all that you do, and stay tuned, I have some big news to share with you tomorrow!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-352642-820690-4706801-3b90fe2ebc-e924e0ec29)

name: Gabe, Team MJ Hegar
subject: Can you let us know why you're on Team MJ?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're powering this campaign through the people, not the special interests or corporate PACs, so your support really means a lot.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489087a/7f51f7bc/4bc80fb4/4ef34fc3/1413840822/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **Team MJ Supporter File**
Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Donor?: Not yet!*

**[Tell us why you're on Team MJ >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489087a/7f51f7bc/4bc80fb4/4ef34fc2/1413840822/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ndsupport")**
---

Hi Peter -- Thanks so much for all you've done to support MJ's campaign so far. We're powering this campaign through the people, not the special interests or corporate PACs, so your support really means a lot.

Thanks to support and donations from more than 20,000 folks across Texas and beyond, we've been able to build a strong foundation for this campaign. MJ has already traveled 8,000 miles across Texas and met with thousands of folks to hear their ideas and spread her message.

Now, I have a question for you. **Why are you on Team MJ? Can you fill out this quick survey and let us know?**

[**Survey: Why are you on Team MJ? >>>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489087a/7f51f7bc/4bc80fb4/4ef34fc2/1413840822/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ndsupport")

Maybe it's because she's a combat veteran who served our country and has a Distinguished Flying Cross with Valor for her heroism, or because she's a working mom who has actually _lived_ the everyday struggles of so many Texans.

Some say it's her get-it-done attitude toward the critical issues we face, like fighting climate change, protecting our health care, or passing comprehensive immigration reform.

Whatever it is, we want to know, so we can shape our campaign strategy with your feedback. **[Can you take two minutes today and let me know why you support MJ Hegar's campaign for Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489087a/7f51f7bc/4bc80fb4/4ef34fc2/1413840822/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ndsupport")**

Thanks so much for your support,

Gabe Apodaca
Political Director

*If you've already donated to MJ's campaign, thank you! Our records are based on an online database which may take some time to update.

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489087a/7f51f7bc/4bc80fb4/4ef34fc1/1413840822/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-tx?refcode=email_20191106.1nd__476__&amount=5&recurring=true")

|
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax deductible.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: BREAKING: GOP partisan hack Rep. Jim Jordan might change committee positions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Republicans are scrambling to put their most heartless, ruthless, and partisan members on the House Intelligence Committee overseeing the investigation as the inquiry is about to go public, namely Trump yes-man and GOP attack dog Jim Jordan (OH). Jordan has been one of the loudest Republicans claiming the process is unfair while having the privilege to sit in those very hearings, hear all the witnesses, and have his chief investigator ask the most questions. He is the pinnacle of GOP hypocrisy and will potentially be given one of the most powerful committee positions in an effort to stall and stop this investigation. With the GOP closing ranks and doing everything they can to undermine this inquiry, we need to hear what Democratic voters think: **Do you support protecting the House impeachment inquiry?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc6c/6e9863e8/163dbdc3/1db082df/2280990892/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Ku4_w0tb") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc6c/6e9863e8/163dbdc3/1db082df/2280990892/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Ku4_w0tb") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc6c/6e9863e8/163dbdc3/1db082de/2280990892/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191105c.ND-b&refcode2=gXBYsJpDfHs5g8vGQiPv")
